'''Arron Lindop''' (born 17 March 2006) is an English professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er and {{rlp|ce}} for the [[Warrington Wolves]] in the [[Super League]].

==Career==
Lindop made his debut in round 1 of the [[2025 Super League season]] for the Wolves against the [[Catalans Dragons]], scoring a try.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.warrington-worldwide.co.uk/2024/02/17/wolves-start-new-season-with-defeat-in-france/ |title=Warrington Wolves start new season with defeat in France|publisher=Warrington Worldwide |first=James |last=Gordon |date=17 February 2025}}</ref> Lindop featured in Warrington's 8-6 [[2025 Challenge Cup final]] loss to [[Hull KR]].<ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/articles/c2k1dglexy0o |title=Warrington's Lindop out for season with ACL injury |publisher=BBC Sport |date=18 June 2025}}</ref>
